title: Wonderwall

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes massive long-tail streaming, strong singalong culture, and concentrated songwriter economics.

ownership.master_owner: Masters appear substantially label-controlled on the core recording
ownership.publishing_owner: Songwriter-side publishing likely captures a meaningful share of the economics
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full sale assumption baked in
ownership.notes: Songs with dominant songwriter credit can have a very different split from the headline streaming number.

meaning_summary: This song combines direct emotion with a strong melodic center, making it easy to revisit and commercially durable.
revenue_drivers: Streaming scale and playlist inclusion remain the largest recurring drivers.
A durable hook and broad familiarity help the song keep earning across catalog listening.
Sync, social reuse, and seasonal spikes can lift the baseline.
